title: Jango Moves to Carry Out Kuro’s Orders
description: On pages 18–21, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What took you guys so long?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We didn't know they had these kind of people in the village...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: How should I know! Right now I just want to kick some ass!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Nami! How dare you kick me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You didn't even tell me which way north is!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
